import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public int minTimeToEatGrains(int[] hens, int[] grains) { Arrays.sort(hens); Arrays.sort(grains); int left = 0; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; boolean can_eat = true; for (int grain : grains) { if (can_eat && hens.length == i || hens[i] > grain + mid) { can_eat = false; break; } ++i; } if (!can_eat) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return left; } }
